render_blueprint.blueprint_name: Cavallini Costa Rica Restorative Dental Travel Operations Manual Render Blueprint v1.0
render_notes: Use the primary color as full-bleed background for the cover page and each chapter-opening section divider page where a domain-overview begins.
Set all text on primary backgrounds to white or near-white for print contrast; use accent for eyebrow labels, rules, and left-bar callouts only.
Render TOC entries from chapter_expansion.chapters as numbered chapter rows with destination section titles matching layout section titles.
For split-panel pages, place descriptive narrative content in the left-major panel and action-oriented lists in the right-secondary panel when space permits.
Render decision_guide arrays as structured decision-gate blocks with visible subfields for if_condition, then_action, else_action, and escalate_when.
Render master_operating_rules and quick_reference_rules as checklist-style rule blocks with hanging numbers and accent left bars.
Preserve source order exactly as defined in each upstream array; do not reorder list items for visual balancing.
If any referenced slot source resolves to missing content at runtime, print the literal text REQUIRES CLARIFICATION in the assigned slot.
Keep each section start on a new page; allow internal overflow to continue to subsequent pages without breaking item numbering.
Because total_worksheets is 0 in chapter_expansion, treat worksheet templates as operational content pages rather than fillable form grids unless richer worksheet fields are present in runtime data.

issues.message: Control domain scope fields are present but empty strings in the visible stage output.
issues.suggested_fix: Populate each control_domains[].scope field with non-empty scope text or remove the field if not required by the contract.

issues.message: The stage output is truncated and does not expose the full control_domains array, preventing validation that all chapter domain references map to real architecture domain IDs.
issues.suggested_fix: Provide the complete system_architecture output including the full control_domains array and all domain IDs.

issues.message: The document_outline stage output is truncated, so required downstream fields and full cascade/domain coverage cannot be fully validated.
issues.suggested_fix: Provide the complete document_outline JSON without truncation.

issues.message: chapter_expansion.total_worksheets is 0, but the chapter content references worksheet IDs such as ws-01-a, ws-01-b, ws-01-c, ws-01-d, and ws-01-e.
issues.suggested_fix: Either define worksheet structures and set total_worksheets accordingly, or remove worksheet ID references from chapter content.

issues.message: The chapter_expansion stage output is truncated, so chapter count, chapter-to-domain mapping, and worksheet reference consistency across all 7 chapters cannot be fully validated.
issues.suggested_fix: Provide the complete chapter_expansion JSON including all chapters and any worksheet definitions.

issues.message: The layout_mapping stage output is truncated, so not all 19 sections, slot definitions, and cross-references can be validated.
issues.suggested_fix: Provide the complete layout_mapping JSON including all sections through sec-19.

issues.message: Visible layout sections reference architecture identifiers such as "system" and "cascade-chain", but those are not validated as concrete IDs in the visible system_architecture output, which exposes domain IDs like domain-01 format instead.
issues.suggested_fix: Use a consistent reference-id scheme across stages or provide explicit reference targets in system_architecture for non-domain objects such as system and cascade-chain.

issues.message: layout_mapping.document_title differs from document_outline.document_title; the layout title uses the system name instead of the document title.
issues.suggested_fix: Align layout_mapping.document_title with document_outline.document_title unless the contract explicitly permits independent title values.

issues.message: The render_blueprint stage output is truncated, so full section coverage and directive-to-section validation across all layout sections cannot be completed.
issues.suggested_fix: Provide the complete render_blueprint JSON including all render_directives.

issues.message: Full chapter-to-domain cross-reference validation cannot be completed because both system_architecture and chapter_expansion outputs are truncated in the provided audit input.
issues.suggested_fix: Provide complete upstream JSON for both stages so every chapter domain_id can be validated against the full architecture domain list.

validation_audit.audit_summary: The pipeline is not render-ready or export-ready. Multiple stages are truncated in the provided audit payload, preventing full validation of required fields, section coverage, and cross-stage references. A confirmed structural failure exists in chapter_expansion where worksheet IDs are referenced despite total_worksheets being 0. Additional cross-reference risk exists in layout_mapping due to reference_id scheme inconsistency and document title mismatch.
